title_en: Xie Lab intelligent website system initiated
title_zh: 谢黎炜课题组智能网站系统启动
body_en: The new platform integrates publication, patent, bilingual content and automated update workflows.
body_zh: 新平台融合论文、专利、双语内容及自动更新工作流。

title_en: Guangdong Province Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars
title_zh: 获广东省杰出青年基金资助
body_en: Dr. Liwei Xie received the Guangdong Province Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars (CNY 1 million).
body_zh: 谢黎炜博士获广东省杰出青年基金资助（100万元）。
